lint.command: set -a; [ -f ./.env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --bin toggl -- -D warnings

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen the cli-worker procedure so workers must explicitly compare the assigned feature against the actual commit/diff and verify any required shared-state reads before claiming a feature is already implemented.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original foundation-local-env-and-output-contract review found a worker claiming no code changes were needed even though commit 8ef4182 only contained the clap/resource-tree migration. Two separate reviews also observed workers marking followedProcedure=true without the skill-required pre-edit reads of repo .factory/library guidance.
